message:
fix(postgres): re-apply SCRAM auth return Ok after rch sync revert

The fix from 173ed90 was accidentally reverted by bulk cleanup
commit 13c5a7d. Re-applying: after authenticate_scram() succeeds,
return Ok(()) immediately since it already reads AuthenticationOk
internally. Without this, the loop continues and reads ParameterStatus
which hits the catch-all error handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
